top_signals.title: Abu Dhabi Proposes New Offshore-Oil Pricing
top_signals.summary: Abu Dhabi National Oil Co., the UAE’s biggest oil company, is proposing a new pricing methodology for the sale of crude supplies to term customers, opting for an approach that’s more aligned with wider regional trading norms, according to people with direct knowledge of the matter. Bloomberg's Anthony di Paola reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Director of ‘47 Ronin’ who gambled Netflix funds on crypto gets 30 months
top_signals.summary: Carl Rinsch will serve two and a half years in prison for taking money meant for a Netflix show to buy Dogecoin, stocks and luxury goods.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Andy Burnham's first big fight could be with Wall Street investors
top_signals.summary: Andy Burnham’s determination to see greater public control over utilities could set him on a collision course with some big-name U.S. investors.
